login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Secure access for admin and manager

login.missingEmailAndPassword: You must enter e-mail and password.

login.unexpectedError: Unexpected error while trying to sign in
login.error401Description: The e-mail or password is incorrect.
login.error400Description: Enter e-mail and password to sign in.
login.error500Description: A server problem occurred. Please try again.
